/etc/hosts.content:
127.0.0.1 localhost
127.0.1.1 ubuntu-server

# The following lines are desirable for IPv6 capable hosts
::1     ip6-localhost ip6-loopback
fe00::0 ip6-localnet
ff00::0 ip6-mcastprefix
ff02::1 ip6-allnodes
ff02::2 ip6-allrouters

/etc/crontab.content:
# /etc/crontab: system-wide crontab
SHELL=/bin/sh
PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin

# m h dom mon dow user  command
17 *  * * *  root  cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.hourly
25 6  * * *  root  test -x /usr/sbin/anacron || ( cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.daily )
0  2  * * 0  root  /opt/backup.sh >> /var/log/backup.log 2>&1
0  3  * * 1  root  /usr/bin/find /tmp -mtime +7 -delete

/etc/ssh/sshd_config.content:
# OpenSSH server configuration
Port 22
AddressFamily any
ListenAddress 0.0.0.0
PermitRootLogin no
PubkeyAuthentication yes
PasswordAuthentication yes
PermitEmptyPasswords no
ChallengeResponseAuthentication no
UsePAM yes
X11Forwarding no
PrintMotd no
AcceptEnv LANG LC_*
Subsystem sftp /usr/lib/openssh/sftp-server
AllowUsers admin
MaxAuthTries 3
LoginGraceTime 60

sudo journalctl -u mysql -n 50
cd /opt
ls
sudo /opt/backup.sh
history
sudo find / -name '*.log' -mtime -1

sudo cat /var/log/auth.log | tail -50
mysql -u root -p
sudo vim /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
nginx -t
sudo systemctl reload nginx

/home/admin/.bashrc.content:
# ~/.bashrc: executed by bash(1) for non-login shells.

# If not running interactively, don't do anything
case $- in
    *i*) ;;
      *) return;;
esac

HISTCONTROL=ignoreboth
HISTSIZE=1000
HISTFILESIZE=2000

alias ll='ls -alF'
alias la='ls -A'
alias l='ls -CF'
alias grep='grep --color=auto'

export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
export EDITOR=vim

/opt/backup.sh.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Daily backup script
BACKUP_DIR="/var/backups/daily"
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d)
DB_USER="backup_user"
DB_PASS="B@ckup#Secr3t"

mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR
mysqldump -u $DB_USER -p$DB_PASS corporate_db > $BACKUP_DIR/corporate_db_$DATE.sql
tar -czf $BACKUP_DIR/www_$DATE.tar.gz /var/www/html/
find $BACKUP_DIR -mtime +30 -delete
echo "Backup completed: $(date)" >> /var/log/backup.log
